description: render_external_node_label guards against a null shared_ptr; render_internal_node_label and render_cached_node_label dereference the pointer unconditionally.

findings.rationale: render_external_node_label has an early-return null check that the other two renderers omit. The guard is load-bearing: external graphs can contain dangling references that surface as null shared_ptrs; without the guard the program dereferences null and segfaults on malformed input.
